PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY, Appointment Under IAEA
Off Calendar Jan-10-2023 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearance via Zoom: Tereza Kolesnikova, Esq. for Kevin Lyons (Petitioner).

The Court briefly addressed the petition and inquired about any objections. Ms. Kolesnikova stated that she was not aware of any objections. The Court stated that notice was given and that it had not received any objections.

There being no objections, the Court granted the Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary. The will dated June 18, 2019 is admitted to probate. Kevin Lyons is appointed as the Executor of the estate with full authority. Bond is not required as the will waived bond. Order for the same signed in open Court. Amy Harrington is appointed probate referee. Status on close of estate is set for January 24, 2024, at 9:00 a.m. in Dept. 204. If a petition for final distribution or a petition for approval of report on status of administration is filed two weeks prior, the status hearing will be taken off calendar.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn. Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda. Deputy: Choi. Matter not reported.
